package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_calls_handler_helper: Service packages that reach upward into handler helpers for parsing, rendering, or Gin-specific utilities.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule161NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule161NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule161NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario161Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule161NegativeService, input Rule161NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
